notes: Their main damage was The Fey (34k magical); 1/5 of you itemized magic resist — that hurt.
Enemy ran 3/5 on or near their meta core.

draftNote: 2 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Willy Guggenheim (offlane→jungle), Xeebs (carry→jungle).

coaching.headline: We held more Primal Fangtooths than they did, then lost every fight that mattered to Shinbi and The Fey.
coaching.team: We actually controlled the late objective board — we took Fangtooth at 6, 13 and 18 and Primal Fangtooth at 24 and 29 — but it didn't matter because we lost the team fights around them. The decisive one was the 13.6 Fangtooth fight (2-4) that gave Shinbi and The Fey the early lead, and the game ended on a 32.2 fight at their Orb Prime (1-3). In between, a bad trade at their half (22.4, 1-4) and a 24.2 loss on our own Primal Fangtooth (0-2) kept the bleeding going. The Fey (34k magical) was their biggest damage threat and only one of us built magic resist. Towers: 3 to their 9. Taking objectives is good — but the fight has to be won first, and we kept contesting majors without the bodies to hold them.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Losing the 13.6 Fangtooth fight (2-4) early to Shinbi and The Fey, then the 32.2 Orb Prime fight (1-3) — we took the camps but never the fights, with only 1 of 5 building magic resist vs 34k.

perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: Boris was the unfavored jungle (theirs all game vs Shinbi) and 8 deaths showed it. Mr_Meat31 fronts the 13.6 Fangtooth loss that set the tone, and carried no magic resist into a 4-magical comp — that's why Boris melted. The engage has to pick winnable fights; into a fed Shinbi with the wrong build, those weren't.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Iggy & Scorch put up real numbers (23k hero damage, 20k to objectives) but died 6 times. Goldilocks324's zone damage helped take the camps; the issue is being present for the lost fights (13.6, 32.2). A setup mid's value is area denial from range, not trading into The Fey in fights the team couldn't win.
perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Zinx was the unfavored support (theirs all game vs Steel) and 6 deaths came from the lost team fights. The Lunaria came at 27, too late to swing the early ones. The support's reads matter most — after the 13.6 and 22.4 losses, the call was to stop contesting majors the team couldn't hold and reset for vision.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Greystone was favored into Akeron but Willy Guggenheim finished 1/6 with 6 deaths — double Willy's norm — and no magic resist into a 4-magical comp. Willy was in the 13.6 and 22.4 losses. As the favored frontline, the team needed Greystone alive to peel The Fey; the build hole and the over-commits cost both.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Drongo was favored but Xeebs' damage (443/min) was 25% under the norm and the line went 4/6. Xeebs was in the 22.4 bad trade (1-4) at their half and the 24.2 loss on our own Primal Fangtooth. The ranged carry's damage has to be online and safe in those objective fights — Drongo was neither, and a favored lane went to waste.

threats: Chain-CC risk (1 hard-CC abilities, ~1.0s of lockdown): Akeron Web Lash (root 1s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Enemy is 4/5 magical — one magic-resist item goes a long way.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Iggy & Scorch Inferno (knockback). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
You have sustain (Zinx) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Detection Protocol track → Chrono Swipe → Primeval Roar shield → Ursine Burst grab ult
ourKits.winCondition: grab a key target out of position and burst them down
ourKits.playWith: a team that collapses on his grabbed target
ourKits.playAgainst: his grab ult is the whole threat — bait it / stay spaced; CC during Primeval Roar

ourKits.combo: Oil Spill → Molotov ignite → Flame Turret → Inferno knockback ult
ourKits.winCondition: layer fire zones on a choke/objective and burn the team
ourKits.playWith: CC that holds enemies in his fire
ourKits.playAgainst: don't fight in his zones — flank; kill the turret, dive him

ourKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
ourKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
ourKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
ourKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

ourKits.combo: Assault The Gates leap → Make Way armor shred → Sacred Oath empowered basic → Stone Forged Soul stasis ult
ourKits.winCondition: front-line aggressively and reset the fight with the stasis heal
ourKits.playWith: a team that fights while he soaks and stasis-resets
ourKits.playAgainst: don't waste burst into his stasis — wait it out; anti-heal cuts the ult heal

ourKits.combo: Old Rusty slow → Gag Grenade silence → Rad Rounds basics → Shrapnel Cannon armor shred
ourKits.winCondition: kite back, stack Wastelander bleed and Rad Rounds, melt from range
ourKits.playWith: peel and frontline so he can free-fire
ourKits.playAgainst: low mobility — dive him or break LoS through his poke; he folds to hard engage

enemyKits.combo: Rushing Beat dashes → Line Tempo wolves → Circle Rhythm shield → All-Kill! wolfpack ult
enemyKits.winCondition: stack Track and unleash All-Kill! in a grouped fight
enemyKits.playAgainst: spread vs the wolfpack; she's squishy without her shield up

enemyKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
enemyKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
enemyKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
enemyKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

enemyKits.combo: Web Lash root → Crushing Maw armor shred → Hellfire eye → Consume pull-channel
enemyKits.winCondition: root with Web Lash and grind with Hunger-stacked haste
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up burst on his rooted target
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge Web Lash — without the root he can't lock you; interrupt Consume

enemyKits.combo: Bramble Patch slow → Harvest Nettles stacks → Untamed Growth DoT → Fly Trap pull ult
enemyKits.winCondition: Fly Trap a clumped team and detonate AoE on the pull
enemyKits.passive: takedowns spawn growths + grant move speed
enemyKits.playWith: engage that clumps for her Fly Trap
enemyKits.playAgainst: spread out vs the pull; she's squishy — dive her

enemyKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
enemyKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
enemyKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
enemyKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
